text:
君の向上心は尽きるという言葉を
知らないようだな！

私としても、そこまでの気概を持つ
教え子に巡り会えて、感無量だ！

では始めるとしよう！
さらなる高みを目指した特

I think what would truly startle me is if your
ambition ever did run dry.

I can hardly tell you how much it means to
me to have a pupil with as much spirit as you!

Now let's get started! We've got to train you
for the climb still ahead!
